query_title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country

recommendations.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
recommendations.overview: The starship Enterprise and its crew is pulled back into action when old nemesis, Khan, steals a top secret device called Project Genesis.

recommendations.title: Time After Time
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Drama, Comedy, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: Writer H. G. Wells pursues Jack the Ripper to modern day San Francisco after the infamous serial killer steals his time machine to escape the 19th century.

recommendations.title: Volunteers
recommendations.overview: After graduating from Yale in 1962, womanizing Lawrence flees a gambling debt that his rich dad won't pay and takes his roomie's place as a Peace Corps Volunteer in the Thai Golden Triangle with two other PCVs. Will he survive two years?

recommendations.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
recommendations.overview: A renegade Vulcan with a startling secret hijacks the U.S.S. Enterprise in order to find a mythical planet.

recommendations.title: The Day After

recommendations.title: Star Wars

recommendations.title: Star Trek Beyond
recommendations.overview: The USS Enterprise crew explores the furthest reaches of uncharted space, where they encounter a mysterious new enemy who puts them and everything the Federation stands for to the test.

recommendations.title: For the Love of Spock
recommendations.overview: The life of Mr. Spock, as well as that of Leonard Nimoy, the actor who played him for almost fifty years, written and directed by his son: Adam.

recommendations.title: Star Trek: First Contact
